title: Sporeadds
description: Mod that adds 4 survivors origins and 1 boss origin based of an infected from the spore mod
body:
A mod **(originally intended for a 4v1 server)** that adds 4 survivor origins and a boss origin based of a spore infected. Each origin is really strong so have that in account.

Kommandant: A creation of the spore infection that feeds off other infected, biomass lumps and human remains, eating low level infected and killing entities to evolve, becoming stronger and unlocking up to 9 skills on top of the base 4.
Starts at 0.2 the scale of a normal player, withit each tier it will grow up to 1.5 on max evolution (you can open the ability hud menu pressing **H** by default)
Also you can use these commands 
~~/setsporephase (number 0-50) to set your biomass
/setlevelphase ( number 0-9) to set your level.~~

/sporeadds (biomass/level) (value) target

Medic: **Only the Medic can use the Injector (ITEM)** that recharges with experience orbs and can switch to remove negative effects or give positive ones upon hitting an entity with it. Medic can also use the **Centrifugator (BLOCK)** built by the **3D Printer (BLOCK)** using a block of iron and a block of redstone. The **Centrifugator** researches blood obtained by using the syringe item on players, it is used to cure a special effect named termina using a vaccine on another player or on himself.

Ghost: Has the ability of becoming invisible and move faster while crouching, Ghost can
also use **Bucket Of Remains: Makes the user be seen as another spore mob for 30 seconds (ITEM)**.

Slasher: A brute force class with more hp and base armor that can perform 2 unique attacks: **an AOE slash with x2** the current damage of the weapon or a **single target attack with x4** with the same use.

Scientist: A class that starts with the ability to use a lot of new items and use the **Research Block** to obtain ingredients and craft new weapons using samples of frozen biomass.

Also if you have any questions you can dm me in discord i don't mind at all :), this is my id: 333926186939842561 .
